description: Schema for data/wc_results.json — actual 2026 World Cup match results recorded by hand after each game.

group.description: Group letter, e.g. "A". Knockout matches are not recorded here.

home.description: Home team display name, exactly as it appears in data/worldcup_2026.json (e.g. "USA", "Bosnia & Herzegovina"). The export script maps these to model names via NAME_ALIASES.

away.description: Away team display name, exactly as it appears in data/worldcup_2026.json.

home_score.description: Goals scored by the home team at full time (90 minutes), excluding extra time or penalties.

away_score.description: Goals scored by the away team at full time (90 minutes), excluding extra time or penalties.
